title: SCP-1471 Mal0
body:
This texture pack replaces the Enderman with SCP-1471 “MalO” (female version) — bringing the eerie yet strangely endearing presence of this SCP into Minecraft with a detailed humanoid design and expressive animations.
The model captures MalO’s distinctive look while maintaining the Enderman’s signature movements and behavior, creating a unique mix of horror and cuteness.

It requires Custom Entity Models (CEM) to work properly, either through Optifine or the mods ETF (Entity Texture Features) and EMF (Entity Model Features) — although ETF and EMF are recommended for the best compatibility and visual results.
